prestazioni: 3UR-FE 5.7L V8 engine (383 hp stock) upgraded with a Harrop HTV2300 supercharger kit (10 psi boost, 650+ hp) paired with a custom ECU flash via Hondata K-Pro for Lexus (3UR-specific fueling and ignition maps), and a full fuel system overhaul including ID1000 injectors, Walbro 450 LPH in-tank pump, and a Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator

Full bolt-on drivetrain reinforcement: RCF (Racing Concepts Fabrication) 3UR-FE billet crankshaft, Manley I-beam connecting rods, and JE Pistons 10.5:1 forged pistons with custom coatings for thermal management; paired with a Tremec TR-6060 6-speed manual transmission swap (LX-specific bellhousing adapter by KAAZ) and a South Bend Clutch twin-disc setup

Suspension and handling: Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (LX 570-specific valving, 3-way adjustable damping), SPC Adjustable Upper Control Arms (for camber correction), and a full chassis brace kit from Cusco (front strut tower bar, rear subframe brace, and 4-point roll cage with bolt-in harness bar for track use)
estetica: Liberty Walk LB Works widebody kit (LX 570 Sport-specific fenders, front bumper, and rear diffuser) with custom carbon fiber overfenders (100mm flares) and a Seibon carbon fiber hood (functional heat extractor vents)

Custom 22-inch Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (9.5J ET20 front, 11J ET15 rear) with Toyo R888R tires (285/35/22 front, 325/30/22 rear), paired with a full Air Lift Performance 3P management system (LX-specific strut mounts) for adjustable ride height

Full interior overhaul: Recaro SP-G seats (LX 570 Sport-specific mounting brackets), Takata Drift III 4-point harnesses, and a custom roll cage wrapped in Alcantara (color-matched to the exterior), with a full carbon fiber dashboard overlay (VIS Racing) and a Motec C127 digital dash (replacing the stock cluster)
